allow: Bash(# Check git history in imweb-backup for older backups cd /Users/sklee/imweb-backup && git log --oneline)
Bash(# Check imweb-product-manager for backups cd /Users/sklee/imweb-product-manager && ls -la *.json .imweb_state.json ; echo ""===""; cat .imweb_state.json | python3 -m json.tool)
Bash(# Search ALL repos for older backups with 오프더트랙 actual content # Check git history in hfk-sklee cd /Users/sklee/hfk-sklee && git log --all --oneline)

Bash(# Check the Obsidian workspace for HFK notes find /Users/sklee/imi-workspace -type f -name ""*오프*"" -o -name ""*트랙*"" echo ""==="" # Check .claude conversations/projects for cached product data find /Users/sklee/.claude -type f -name ""*.json"")

Bash(# hfk-imweb is in iCloud find ""/Users/sklee/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/hfk-imweb"" -type f \\\( -name ""*오프*"" -o -name ""*98*"" -o -name ""*114*"" \\\) echo ""=== all json/html files ==="" find ""/Users/sklee/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/hfk-imweb"" -type f \\\( -name ""*.json"" -o -name ""*.html"" \\\))
Bash(do if python3 -c " import json try: d = open\(''$f'',''r''\).read\(\) if ''오프더트랙'' in d and ''content'' in d: print\(''$f''\) except: pass ")
Bash(# VSCode/Cursor 히스토리에서 검색 find /Users/sklee/.vscode /Users/sklee/.cursor -type f -name ""*.json"")
Bash(# Check if imweb-backup has any other files ls -laR /Users/sklee/imweb-backup/)
Bash(# Also check if there are JSON product files in hfk-sklee find /Users/sklee/hfk-sklee -name ""*product*"" -o -name ""*상품*"")
